summary: Iteration 39 - Live Execution Layer Testing Complete. All 28 backend tests passed. Frontend Admin Dashboard verified with REAL MODE banner, Instant Withdraw ACTIVE. Full DEX integration with PancakeSwap V2 confirmed - NENO liquidity pool exists at 0x27f9610fCe91B27aC98D7426Ebbb10110A7CdACd.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Live Execution Layer fully tested. All endpoints working correctly. (1) GET /api/live/pipeline/assess returns pipeline_ready=true, hot_wallet data (address, neno, bnb, gas_ok), dex_liquidity (neno_wbnb_pool=true, neno_pair_address=0x27f9610fCe91B27aC98D7426Ebbb10110A7CdACd), swap_quotes (neno_to_usdc, bnb_to_usdc), fiat_rails (stripe_sepa=active, circle=active), cashout_engine running status, blockers list. (2) GET /api/live/dex/quote returns real PancakeSwap V2 quotes with success, amount_in, amount_out, rate, path, dex='PancakeSwap V2'. (3) GET /api/live/dex/liquidity/NENO returns has_liquidity=true, pair_address. (4) GET /api/live/dex/history returns swap execution history with TX hashes. (5) GET /api/live/pipeline/history returns pipeline execution history. (6) GET /api/sync/state returns real_mode=true, hot_wallet, usdc_wallets. (7) GET /api/sync/instant-withdraw/status returns active=true. (8) GET /api/sync/reconciliation returns system_healthy=true. (9) GET /api/cashout/report returns comprehensive report. (10) GET /api/circle/wallets/balances returns 3 segregated wallets (CLIENT, TREASURY, REVENUE). (11) All /api/live endpoints require auth (401 without). (12) POST endpoints (execute, swap, convert-neno) require admin role. Frontend Admin Dashboard shows REAL MODE banner with Instant Withdraw: ACTIVE. Cashout Engine and Auto-Op Loop show OFF status.
